description: Exercises autoScreenshot end-to-end through the real runner and the nested REST artifact tree (specs/<specId>/tests/<testId>/contexts/<contextId>/screenshots/<NN>-<action>-<stepId>.png). Covers the precedence permutations: spec-level true inherited by a test, a test-level false that overrides the spec-level true (captures nothing), a truthy string coercion, and headless capture. autoScreenshot is set at the spec level so the per-test false demonstrates the override. Browser capture needs headed Chrome (Windows/macOS); the headless permutation runs everywhere.

tests.description: Test-level autoScreenshot:true captures a screenshot after every browser-driven step (goTo, find) on headed Chrome.
Test-level autoScreenshot:false overrides the spec-level true, so no screenshots are captured; the test still passes.
A truthy string autoScreenshot value (API/coercion path) resolves to true and captures screenshots on headed Chrome.
Headless Chrome still captures auto screenshots into the nested tree; runs on every platform.
